description: SAP delivers an ecosystem that can provide real-time updates and personalized recommendations that provide seamless, end-to-end experiences.

description: SAP researchers addressed the challenge of unstructured data by bringing intelligent document processing directly into core business applications.
evidence: The solution has become deeply embedded across SAP’s portfolio and is used by tens of thousands of customers worldwide to process billions of documents.
title: Intelligent document processing
